candidates.title: Safety State Atomic-Write Hardening
candidates.description: Replaces fixed <target>.tmp safety-state persistence patterns with a stdlib-only unique same-directory atomic-write helper. Migrates heartbeat, deadman, kill-switch, and safety-state writes while preserving file formats, public APIs, permissions, and fail-closed behavior.
notes: Accepted into the v0.6.17 candidate chain; remains planning-only.
Does not enable live trading, live submit, order placement, broker/provider execution, credential loading, or approval queue mutation.
No version bump, tag, GitHub Release, or PyPI publication.
Resolves the doctor CLI compatibility contract warning.
Adds regression and concurrency tests under tests/safety/.
